name: The Reaper

friendly.greeting: A diligent slave. I like that.
friendly.farewell: Keep offering souls. I shall guarantee your lifespan in return.

normal.farewell: Try to run, but you are always in the palm of my hand.

hostile.greeting: Do you wish for death? It seems your labor has been insufficient.

intro.still_working: The Reaper: "Still not finished with the cleanup? Return to me once you are done..."
dialogues: The Reaper: "Still that arrogant look in your eyes. You seem to think the dust of the empire you once ruled still clings to you."

The Reaper: "Make no mistake.
In this Terminal, you are but one of the many common dead, standing in line awaiting judgment."

The Reaper: "If you wish to survive, start with the menial labor you so despised.
As it happens, something foul has taken root in the B2 Transfer Junction."

The Reaper: "[Belphegor, the Crawling Sin].
A grotesque mass of flesh born from souls who dared to flee judgment, now fused together in their insolence."
The Reaper: "Those wretched things have occupied the tracks, and their screaming is delaying the transport of souls."
The Reaper: "Go and excise that filth. That is, if your rusted scythe is still capable of even paring the rind of a soul."
The Reaper: "Go [Down] and you will find the elevator to the sub-levels. Report back once the cleaning is complete..."
intro.failure_threat: The Reaper: "And if you fail? Do not fret. Your soul will simply become part of that meat mass, scrubbing tracks for eternity. Hahaha!"

level_up.confirm_offer: If you offer {{cost}} Soul Fragments, perhaps a fraction of your former glory might return...
level_up.reject_coward: The Reaper: "Coward. I shall see how long that frailty of yours manages to keep you among the living."
level_up.success_msg: ✨ Congratulations! You have leveled up. (Current LV.{{level}})
level_up.fail_msg: [FAILED] Light as a feather. Is this all you have to offer? ({{current}}/{{required}})

skill_transfer.all_learned: [Notice] You have already mastered all available techniques.
skill_transfer.select_prompt: Select a skill to inherit (Available Soul Shards: {{exp}})
skill_transfer.success: 💀 [Acquired] Heh... Do not forget the '{{name}}' etched into your soul..
skill_transfer.fail: [Failed] You do not meet the requirements.

memorize.welcome_grown: Reaper: "Oho... The vessel of your soul has grown. You can now withstand more techniques."
memorize.welcome_default: Reaper: "Choose the techniques to be etched upon your soul..."
memorize.validate_min: You must select at least one skill.
memorize.validate_max: You can only select up to {{max}} skills.
memorize.exit_grown: Reaper: "May that bloated knowledge not lead you to ruin..."
memorize.exit_default: Reaper: "I hope your choice was a wise one..."
memorize.cancel: Reaper: "Hesitation leads only to death..." (Selection cancelled.)

tutorial_over: Reaper: "Oho... So you've cleared that stench-ridden pile of filth? I'm surprised your limbs are still attached."

Reaper: "(With a sickening sneer) I could hear the death throes of those crawling sins all the way here.
Surely you weren't expecting praise, were you?"
Reaper: "But... I will admit. Your desperate struggling is somewhat useful."
Reaper: "This time, go and clear the filth from the B3 Loading Dock."
Reaper: "Perform well, and I might just unseal more of your pathetic abilities."
Reaper: "The more soul essence you offer, the more of those forgotten [Skills] I shall grant you."
defeat_golem: Reaper: "Oho... I sent you to clean, yet you've gone and turned the docking bay's Golem into a pile of scrap metal."

Reaper: "(Scanning you with cold eyes) Your brutish habits haven't changed a bit. 
Do you have any idea how much essence it costs to restore that Golem?"

Reaper: "Tch... fine. There's no use blaming broken scrap. 
Right now, there is 'filth with a far worse stench' that needs clearing."

Reaper: "There was a rat who dared to deceive my eyes, trying to smuggle his own flesh and blood into sub-space. 
That child was personally eradicated by my hand, yet it seems the father still hasn't let go of his lingering attachments."

Reaper: "Go down to B4 immediately. 
Find [Charon], the former low-level official who fled and is hiding deep within that derelict zone."

Reaper: "Go and sever his breath. Bring his soul shards before me. 
For a filthy traitor, the only fitting end is to return to complete 'nothingness'."

Reaper: "Remember. If you complicate things this time... 
I will carve the very despair he felt directly into your shadow. Now, begone."

deceived: Reaper: "So you've found the fugitive at last. Good work tracking down that rat hiding in the crevices of sub-space."
Reaper: "(Hovering the deceptive shard in the air, scanning it) ...Hmm."
Reaper: "The color of this soul... it seems faint. Is it because it was a fragment forcibly torn away without the will of the host?"
Reaper: "(Staring as if piercing through your very eyes) Or is it because some remnant of betrayal still lingers, plotting against its master?"
Reaper: "...No matter. What's important is that the essence of the soul has been recovered here."
loyal: Reaper: "You've returned. I see that a final period has at last been marked over Charon's name in the ledger."
Reaper: "(Pointing at the cold, lifeless shard) This is the end for an official who defied providence, blinded by the grief of losing a child."
Reaper: "You have wiped away the stain of 'personal emotion' quite thoroughly."
Reaper: "As promised, I shall use this essence you've brought as the key to unbind your soul's shackles."
Reaper: "(As the tip of the scythe brushes your chest, the suppressed energy of a sovereign surges.)"
Reaper: "That vast legion you once commanded while ruling the continent... I shall grant you back a portion of that power."
Reaper: "Continue to retrieve the soul shards of those who break the laws. With each shard gathered, I shall restore the sovereign's authority you once lost, one by one."
